types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_f6e87883_74af_491c_b1f1_94219a29d889_Input_Attributes = {| clientCertificate?: {| publicKey?: {| |}, "type"?: String, encoded?: Binary |}, headers: {| |}, listenerPath: String, method: String, queryParams: {| |}, queryString: String, relativePath: String, remoteAddress: String, requestPath: String, requestUri: String, scheme: String, uriParams: {| |}, version: String, localAddress: String |}

types:type.name: auto_f6e87883-74af-491c-b1f1-94219a29d889_Output-Payload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_f6e87883_74af_491c_b1f1_94219a29d889_Output_Payload = { dateTime: String, data?: {| recordCount: Number, customers: Array<{| customerType: "BUSINESS" | "INDIVIDUAL", addresses?: Array<{| country: String, city: String, addressType: "BILLING" | "SHIPPING", postalCode?: String, state?: String, line2?: String, line1: String |} {"label": "Address", "description": "Canonical representation of an address associated with the customer."}> {"description": "Addresses associated with the customer.", "label": "Addresses"}, metadata?: { _?: Any } {"label": "Metadata", "description": "Optional integration metadata or non-critical attributes that do not justify first-class
canonical properties.
"}, createdDate?: String, lastModifiedDate?: String, externalIds?: {| sapCustomerNumber?: String, salesforceAccountId?: String, oracleCustomerId?: String |} {"label": "External IDs", "description": "Source-system identifiers associated with the customer."}, name: String, id: String, sourceSystems?: Array<"SALESFORCE" | "ORACLE_EBS" | "SAP_ECC"> {"description": "Source business systems that contribute to the canonical customer record in the current
payload.
", "label": "Source Systems"}, contacts?: Array<{| role: "BILLING" | "PRIMARY" | "TECHNICAL", phone?: String, name?: String, email?: String |} {"description": "Canonical representation of a contact point associated with the customer.

Contacts are modeled separately so that multiple business contacts can be associated with a
single customer record.
", "label": "Contact"}> {"description": "Business contacts associated with the customer.", "label": "Contacts"}, status?: "ACTIVE" | "INACTIVE" |} {"label": "Customer", "description": "Canonical representation of a customer used across Customer Process APIs.

This model abstracts customer information from participating source systems such as
Salesforce, Oracle EBS, and SAP ECC into a normalized business-oriented structure.
"}> {"label": "Customers", "description": "Canonical customer records returned by the Process API."} |} {"description": "Canonical customer retrieval payload for Process API responses.", "label": "Customer Get Data"}, httpStatus: Number, correlationId?: String, details?: Array<{ severity: "ERROR" | "INFO" | "WARNING", code?: String, message: String, target?: String, _?: Any } {"description": "Structured detail message returned by the API.

Detail messages provide additional actionable information such as validation failures, skipped
records, unsupported values, or other context that helps the client understand the outcome
without changing the top-level response message.
", "label": "Response detail"}> {"description": "Optional list of structured detail messages that provide additional context,
such as validation failures, warnings, or informational notes.
"}, message: String, status: "SUCCESS" | "ERROR" | "WARNING", _?: Any } {"label": "Get Customers Response", "description": "Standard API response envelope with aggregated customer retrieval payloads.
"}

types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_230b1eda_b922_4365_8cc0_9014e20b7142_Input_Payload = { dateTime: String, data?: { processedCount: Number, recordCount: Number, downstreamSystems: Array<"SALESFORCE" | "ORACLE_EBS" | "SAP_ECC"> {"description": "Downstream systems targeted by the synchronization process.", "label": "Downstream Systems"}, _?: Any } {"label": "Data", "description": "Processing summary for the synchronization event."}, httpStatus: Number, correlationId?: String, details?: Array<{ severity: "ERROR" | "INFO" | "WARNING", code?: String, message: String, target?: String, _?: Any } {"description": "Structured detail message returned by the API.

Detail messages provide additional actionable information such as validation failures, skipped
records, unsupported values, or other context that helps the client understand the outcome
without changing the top-level response message.
", "label": "Response detail"}> {"description": "Optional list of structured detail messages that provide additional context,
such as validation failures, warnings, or informational notes.
"}, message: String, status: "SUCCESS" | "ERROR" | "WARNING", _?: Any } {"description": "Standard response envelope returned after processing a canonical customer synchronization event.
", "label": "Process Customer Sync Event Response"}

types:type.name: Customer-Sync-Events-Request-Payload-JSON-Example
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type Customer_Sync_Events_Request_Payload_JSON_Example = {| eventType: String, sourceSystem: String, occurredAt: String, customer: {| id: String, externalIds: {| salesforceAccountId: String, oracleCustomerId: String, sapCustomerNumber: String |}, sourceSystems: Array<String>, name: String, customerType: String, status: String, contacts: Array<{| role: String, name: String, email: String, phone: String |}>, addresses: Array<{| addressType: String, line1: String, line2: String, city: String, state: String, postalCode: String, country: String |}>, metadata: {| industry: String, paymentTerms: String, customerSegment: String, preferredLanguage: String |}, createdDate: String, lastModifiedDate: String |} |} {"example": "{\\\"eventType\\\":\\\"CUSTOMER_UPDATED\\\",\\\"sourceSystem\\\":\\\"SF_BRILM\\\",\\\"occurredAt\\\":\\\"2026-03-24T17:30:00Z\\\",\\\"customer\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"CUST-10001\\\",\\\"externalIds\\\":{\\\"salesforceAccountId\\\":\\\"001bm00000J2nswAAB\\\",\\\"oracleCustomerId\\\":\\\"1000002451\\\",\\\"sapCustomerNumber\\\":\\\"0001234567\\\"},\\\"sourceSystems\\\":[\\\"SF_BRILM\\\",\\\"SAP_ECC\\\",\\\"ORACLE_EBS\\\",\\\"SF_UMBRE\\\"],\\\"name\\\":\\\"Acme Corporation\\\",\\\"customerType\\\":\\\"BUSINESS\\\",\\\"status\\\":\\\"ACTIVE\\\",\\\"contacts\\\":[{\\\"role\\\":\\\"PRIMARY\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"Jane Doe\\\",\\\"email\\\":\\\"jane.doe@acme.example\\\",\\\"phone\\\":\\\"+1-206-555-0112\\\"},{\\\"role\\\":\\\"BILLING\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"Accounts Payable\\\",\\\"email\\\":\\\"ap@acme.example\\\",\\\"phone\\\":\\\"+1-206-555-0198\\\"},{\\\"role\\\":\\\"TECHNICAL\\\",\\\"name\\\":\\\"John Smith\\\",\\\"email\\\":\\\"john.smith@acme.example\\\",\\\"phone\\\":\\\"+1-206-555-0133\\\"}],\\\"addresses\\\":[{\\\"addressType\\\":\\\"BILLING\\\",\\\"line1\\\":\\\"100 Main Street\\\",\\\"line2\\\":\\\"Suite 400\\\",\\\"city\\\":\\\"Seattle\\\",\\\"state\\\":\\\"WA\\\",\\\"postalCode\\\":\\\"98101\\\",\\\"country\\\":\\\"USA\\\"},{\\\"addressType\\\":\\\"SHIPPING\\\",\\\"line1\\\":\\\"500 Distribution Way\\\",\\\"line2\\\":\\\"Building B\\\",\\\"city\\\":\\\"Kent\\\",\\\"state\\\":\\\"WA\\\",\\\"postalCode\\\":\\\"98032\\\",\\\"country\\\":\\\"USA\\\"}],\\\"metadata\\\":{\\\"industry\\\":\\\"Manufacturing\\\",\\\"paymentTerms\\\":\\\"NET_30\\\",\\\"customerSegment\\\":\\\"Enterprise\\\",\\\"preferredLanguage\\\":\\\"en-US\\\"},\\\"createdDate\\\":\\\"2026-03-12T18:25:43Z\\\",\\\"lastModifiedDate\\\":\\\"2026-03-24T17:25:12Z\\\"}}"}
